special_mechanics.name: Driving Levels
special_mechanics.description: Game includes several driving levels alongside platforming sections

tier_notes: Tier 3: Only qualitative review data available. Source mentions 'uneven, jerky' experience with 'awkward' controls and 'blocky graphics' (from NES version reference). SNES version criticized for graphics resembling 8-bit rather than 16-bit capability. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available source material. Game features platforming and driving stages with Kyle Reese as protagonist. Checkpoints noted as being placed too far apart, affecting difficulty.
sources_used: Wikipedia - List of Terminator video games
